title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Some of the children got past us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll be back to square one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Mochya!! You won't get away with this!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Give it back!! Give back our candy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You can't! spit it all out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So master is a bad man!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: yeah, he's a really bad guy.

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
